nasb.text: There you will serve gods, the work of man’s hands, wood and stone, which neither see nor hear nor eat nor smell.

esv.text: And there you will serve gods of wood and stone, the work of human hands, that neither see, nor hear, nor eat, nor smell.

cnv.text: 在那裡你們必事奉人手所做的神，就是用木頭石頭做成的，不能看、不能聽、不能吃、不能聞的神。

ccb.text: 你们必在那里供奉人用木石造的不会看、不会听、不会吃、不会闻的神像。
